MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-29-2007 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Lucas Chong is present.
Edward Alexander Nagy appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendants Myriam Rodriguez and Herlinda Ortega are present.
Tyler Macmillan representing the defendants through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed. This case settled, the trial date of September 4, 2007 is vacated.
